Class UserDatabaseRepository

java.lang.Object
hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.AbstractRepository<User>
hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.UserDatabaseRepository
public class UserDatabaseRepository extends AbstractRepository<User>
Repository for managing User data in the database. Follows the singleton pattern — use getInstance() to get the instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(User entity)
    Deletes a user from the database.

    Returns all users from the database.

    Finds a user by their id.
    Optional<User>

    Finds a user by their username.
    static UserDatabaseRepository
    getInstance()
    Returns the singleton instance of this repository.
    void
    save(User entity)
    Saves a new user to the database.

    update(User entity)
    Updates an existing user in the database.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static UserDatabaseRepository getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of this repository.
      Returns:
      the single UserDatabaseRepository instance

    • findById

      public Optional<User> findById(Long id)
      Finds a user by their id.
      Specified by:
      findById in class AbstractRepository<User>
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the user to find
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user if found, or empty if not
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • findAll

      public List<User> findAll()
      Returns all users from the database.
      Specified by:
      findAll in class AbstractRepository<User>
      Returns:
      list of all users, empty list if none found
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • save

      public void save(User entity)
      Saves a new user to the database.
      Specified by:
      save in class AbstractRepository<User>
      Parameters:
      entity - the user to save
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • delete

      public void delete(User entity)
      Deletes a user from the database.
      Specified by:
      delete in class AbstractRepository<User>
      Parameters:
      entity - the user to delete
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • update

      public void update(User entity)
      Updates an existing user in the database.
      Specified by:
      update in class AbstractRepository<User>
      Parameters:
      entity - the user with updated values
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs

    • findUserByUsername

      public Optional<User> findUserByUsername(String username)
      Finds a user by their username.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to search for
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the user if found, or empty if not
      Throws:
      RepositoryAccessException - if a database error occurs
